value.description: Currently selected value or array of values (for multiple selection).

searchable.description: Show a search input above the list.

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

grouped.description: Group items using the groupBy function.

groupBy.description: Returns the group name for each option.

selectAll.description: Show a Select All checkbox (requires multiple).

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when the option list is empty.

maxHeight.description: Max height of the scrollable list.

itemTemplate.description: Custom renderer for each option item.
